product_overview: SessionFlow is a web platform for engineers and administrators to manage teaching groups, schedule sessions, track attendance, and communicate in real time. It provides portal-specific authentication, group and session management, a weekly timetable, and an admin control tower for approvals and system settings.
core_goals: Allow engineers and admins to sign in and access a personalized dashboard of upcoming sessions and attendance summaries.
Create and manage teaching groups with schedules and student rosters.
Run sessions and record student attendance (Present/Absent/Late).
Provide a weekly timetable view for scheduling and quick navigation to session details.
Facilitate real-time group communication via chat with presence indicators.
Enable administrators to review and approve engineer registrations and manage system settings.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate as an Admin or Student portal user using email/identifier and password to access protected areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select portal mode (Admin or Student) -> Fill email/identifier -> Fill password -> Toggle remember me (optional) -> Submit login form -> See dashboard (/dashboard) on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill invalid credentials -> Submit login form -> See error toast message on invalid credentials

features.name: Engineer Registration
features.description: Register a new engineer account with name, email and password and receive a pending status for admin approval when applicable.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit registration form -> See success toast and get redirected to /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill invalid or incomplete data -> Submit registration form -> See validation error message

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: See an overview of session statistics, upcoming sessions, and quick action cards to jump into session and group workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View total sessions count and attendance summary statistics -> View upcoming sessions list -> Open a session card from the list to view session details

features.name: Group Management
features.description: Create, edit, search, and archive teaching groups; configure weekly schedules and add students to groups.
user_flows: Navigate to /groups -> Start creating a new group -> Fill group name, description, level, and frequency -> Configure weekly schedules (day, time, duration) -> Add students to group -> Submit group creation -> See new group listed in group list
Navigate to /groups -> Start creating a new group -> Provide a frequency that does not match configured schedules -> Submit group creation -> See validation error about schedule/frequency mismatch

features.name: Session Attendance
features.description: Start a session, mark each student's attendance status (Present/Absent/Late), and save attendance records with a summary view.
user_flows: Navigate to /sessions -> Select a session from the list to open its details -> View session details (group, date, status) -> Start session -> Mark each student as Present, Absent, or Late -> Save attendance records -> View updated attendance summary

features.name: Real-time Chat
features.description: Participate in group chats with real-time message delivery and presence indicators to coordinate with students and engineers.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Select a chat group from the sidebar -> Type message in input field -> Send message -> See the sent message appended to chat history -> Observe online/offline presence indicators for participants -> Scroll through message history

features.name: Timetable View
features.description: Browse the weekly timetable to see scheduled sessions, navigate between weeks, and inspect session details for scheduling decisions.
user_flows: Navigate to /timetable -> View the weekly schedule grid -> Navigate between weeks -> Select a session block to view session details

features.name: Admin Control Tower
features.description: For administrators: review pending engineer registrations, approve or deny applicants, and access system settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /control-tower/admin -> View list of pending engineer registrations -> Approve or deny a pending engineer -> Observe removal of the processed engineer from the pending list -> Navigate to /settings to access system configuration

routes.description: User login page with email/password, admin and student portal modes
Engineer registration page with access code validation
Main dashboard with session stats, upcoming sessions, and quick actions
Group management - create, edit, delete groups with schedules and students
View all sessions for a specific group
List all sessions across groups with filtering
Session detail view with attendance tracking
Weekly timetable view with drag-and-drop scheduling
Real-time group chat with SignalR WebSocket messaging
Admin control panel for engineer approvals and system settings
Engineer dashboard with assigned groups and session overview
Platform settings (SMTP, system config) - admin only

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials, supports Admin and Student portal modes
user_interactions: Switch between Admin and Student login modes
See error toast message on invalid credentials

features.name: Engineer Registration
features.description: Register as a new engineer with name, email, password
user_interactions: See success toast and redirect to login
See error toast on validation failure

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View session statistics, upcoming sessions, and quick action cards
user_interactions: Click on session card to navigate to session detail

features.name: Group Management
features.description: Create, edit, and delete teaching groups with schedule configuration
user_interactions: Fill group name, description, level, frequency
View group list with search and filter

features.name: Session Attendance
features.description: Start sessions and mark student attendance (Present/Absent/Late)
user_interactions: Mark each student as Present, Absent, or Late

features.name: Real-time Chat
features.description: Group messaging with real-time delivery via SignalR
user_interactions: Select a chat group from sidebar
Send message with Enter or send button

features.name: Timetable View
features.description: Weekly calendar view showing all scheduled sessions
user_interactions: Click on session block for details

features.name: Admin Control Tower

user_interactions: View list of pending engineer registrations
Click Approve or Deny button for each pending engineer

known_limitations.issue: Frontend proxies API to remote Railway backend, not localhost
known_limitations.impact: Tests that modify data will affect the production database

known_limitations.issue: Student login requires studentId and engineerCode fields
known_limitations.impact: Student portal login requires additional setup data
